questions.question: Does StudyTimer render Start/Stop controls on the topic page?
questions.actionable_check: Check pages/topic/[slug].tsx renders StudyTimer, E2E test 1 confirms start-session-btn visible
questions.pass_criteria: Start Session button visible on topic page

questions.question: Does starting a session record activeSession in lp_studyTimes_v1?
questions.actionable_check: Check useStudyTimer.start() calls writeStudyTimes with activeSession object
questions.pass_criteria: activeSession = { startedAt, topicSlug } written to localStorage on start

questions.question: Does stopping a session append a completed StudySession to sessions array?
questions.actionable_check: Check useStudyTimer.stop() creates StudySession with id, startedAt, endedAt, durationMs and appends to sessions
questions.pass_criteria: Session appended with correct fields, activeSession cleared

questions.question: Does the /study-times page show today's and this week's total study time?
questions.actionable_check: Check StudyTimeSummary renders today-total and week-total data-testid elements
questions.pass_criteria: today-total and week-total visible with formatted duration

questions.question: Does the session list show recent sessions with topic, time range, and duration?
questions.actionable_check: Check SessionList renders session items with topic title, start/end times, and duration badge
questions.pass_criteria: session-list visible with at least one session item showing topic and duration

questions.question: Is there a recovery banner when user refreshes during an active session?
questions.actionable_check: useStudyTimer detects activeSession in localStorage on mount, sets hasOrphanedSession=true, StudyTimer renders recovery banner
questions.pass_criteria: session-recovery-banner visible after refresh during active session

questions.question: Does the recovery banner allow continuing or stopping the orphaned session?
questions.actionable_check: session-recover-continue resumes timer, session-recover-stop records session and dismisses banner
questions.pass_criteria: Stopping via recovery banner records session, banner dismissed

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 6 Story 06 E2E tests pass?
Do all prior story tests still pass (no regressions)?
